Prayer Shawl  
 


Slot: SHOULDERS
AC: 5
WIS: +8
WT: 0.4 Size: SMALL
Class: CLR DRU SHM
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)
Prayer Shawl

Slot: SHOULDERS
AC: 5
WIS: +8
WT: 0.4 Size: SMALL
Class: CLR DRU SHM
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)

Item Type:Armor
Stackable:No
Merchant Value:18 pp 0 gp 0 sp 0 cp
Tribute:650
Lucy Entry By:Kerasota
Item Updated By:SwiftyMUSE
Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2022-01-15 18:42:56
Page Updated:Mon Apr 24th, 2017

Expansion: Original
Average Price: No Data Pricing Data...
Rarity: Rare
Level to Attain: 49
[Drops | Comments ]

Drops

This item is found on creatures.

Kedge Keep
NPC Name
Estrella of Gloomwater
The Fabled Estrella of Gloomwater


Zone(s) Found In:


Zone Name
Kedge Keep


Uploaded May 31st, 2017 by Bobbybick
Send a correction
Post Comment
Price??!!!
QuoteReply
# Feb 10 2004 at 5:10 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
i dont know about you all but 2k is not high enough but around 8k i can see that..i must say however that i have one myself and have had it since i was around level 24...the best amount of pp that ive spent on items was with the Prayer Shawl. i will tell you all this though...i DID NOT pay 2 or even 8k...i got mine for a VERY LOW price of 200pp. i dont know what the guy was thinking when i found this in Bazaar mode but i snatched it up right away. i want to know if this drop is common or rare in Kedge Keep. maybe its just my server price (Tunare) but 200pp did seem a bit low for it. i will tell you though that anything b/w 8 and 10k would be worth it. seeing as how there are not very many good shoulder items out there for an IKS SHM. if you all know any. please reply and let me know. :)
▲ Page top
RE: Price??!!!
QuoteReply
# May 18 2004 at 8:07 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591769885198
View User Forum
215 posts
Why is this so much still? 8 wis with no other stats is pretty cruddy much better out there for cheaper, I would rather of three stat rasing mods than on big one youre gonna max out your wis with nothing else to show for it which is somewhat pointless
▲ Page top
RE: Price??!!!
QuoteReply
# Aug 31 2004 at 10:01 AM Rating: Decent
Treesong
View User Forum
Scholar
169 posts
There's a whole new market out there for twink items, and this thing will sell quickly to anyone who is rolling a new druid/shammie/cleric Alt/Box/Twink and wants him to start out with some good Wis. No levelrequirement is worth good money and paying 2k is nothing for someone who already has some level 65 toon.

Just check some items that seem overpriced and see if they do not have a levelrequirement.

▲ Page top

Thanks to these people, this item sells for 32k on the Nameless. Hurray for plat duping. =\

yeah right, 32k for that thing 31st january 2004?

RE: Thank you, Yantis and IGE
QuoteReply
# Feb 05 2004 at 11:50 AM Rating: Good
__DEL__1592344474330
Sage
3,705 posts
I'm thinking 32k for this, is more likely one of the same idiots with the 10k water flasks, and 90k gnoll heads, rather than someone actually trying to make a sale.

That, or they are hoping someone will think it is part of the quest for the BLESSED COLDAIN prayer shawl (its not).
▲ Page top
Kedge Keep
QuoteReply
# Mar 29 2002 at 11:57 AM Rating: Good
__DEL__1591776536500
6 posts
I got one of these in Kedge Keep off Estrella Of Gloomwater, Took her out with me, 57 Magician, 53 Paly, and 49 Druid, she dropped fast, I would say all you who want to pharm KK, a full group from level's 45-50 would be able to handle most anything, just stay away from Phinny.. He's a hoe.

Sylfein Eilserus (57 Dark-Elf Magician - Morell Thule)

.. Everquest, its not just a game, its a way of life.
▲ Page top
Not for shammy
QuoteReply
# Jan 24 2002 at 4:45 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592347907391
Scholar
56 posts
For the money, the Chokidai Hide Spaulders are better than this item for a shammy. Shammy's should NOT waste the 8K on this item - buy the spaulders for <2K.

Compare the stats and you'll see...
